prompt:
A 4x6 archival photo print resting on a dark tabletop, showing a bright continuous streak crossing a starry night sky above a simple horizon silhouette, clearly representing a long-exposure ISS pass. A corner of the print curls slightly, and a pencil plus small notebook nearby suggest it is preserved as documented evidence of a successful flyover capture.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a calm near-future astronomy aesthetic: soft indoor lighting, realistic photo-paper sheen, no logos, no readable annotations, and no identifiable faces. Keep the print centered and uncluttered so it reads clearly as a DSPACE astrophotography proof artifact.
